title: Telco ODS - Autonomous Network Health
description: Real-time network health monitoring powered by MongoDB Atlas, Apache Flink, and MLflow

charts.title: Network Health Distribution
charts.description: Current distribution of network health predictions across all cell towers

charts.title: Anomaly Rate Over Time
charts.description: Number of 'poor' health predictions per 5-minute window by region

charts.title: Regional Health Heatmap
charts.description: Network health status breakdown by Australian region

charts.title: Signal Strength vs Latency
charts.description: Correlation between average signal strength and latency per window

charts.title: Events Processed (Throughput)
charts.aggregation: sum of event_count in last 5 minutes
charts.description: Total telemetry events processed in the latest window

charts.title: Predictions Timeline
charts.description: Prediction volume over time, stacked by health category

notes: Configure this dashboard in Atlas Charts UI. Use Change Streams for real-time updates. Enable auto-refresh at 10s interval.
